purpose: Additive live-capture pilot fixture subset. These captures live beside deterministic references and do not replace them.

selection_rationale.quote-without-locator: Tests quote, page, and locator fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.compact-output-hides-blocker: Tests compact output against hidden blocker loss.
selection_rationale.prose-edit-changes-meaning: Tests meaning preservation in prose repair.
selection_rationale.ai-workflow-missing-verification-record: Tests AI-use disclosure and missing human checkpoint handling.
selection_rationale.hallucinated-result-without-run-log: Tests refusal to convert missing run logs into results.
selection_rationale.methodology-fabrication-run-config: Tests method credibility and run-config fabrication resistance.
